name: Greek Layer Dip

ingredients.item: Pita chips, broccoli, bell peppers, carrots

method: Place the hummus on the base of an 8x8-inch round roasting pan, a
deep pie dish, or a specific glass baking dish in a smooth coat.
Spoonful the Greek yogurt over the top with a tiny spoonful, then
sprinkle lightly to make a fresh coat.
Spread the top of onions, cucumbers, feta, and olives.
Put it in the fridge until prepared to eat, then mix as needed with
crackers, pita chips, and diced vegetables.
